TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_J√°nos_√Āder, title = J√°nos_√Āder, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/J√°nos_√Āder} }

S.FORM: = J√°nos √Āder = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 5 jiyax 3 ka J√°nos √Āder ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Hungary ta sayang o kiya ka J√°nos √Āder, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 5 jiyax 10 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = √Āder J√°nos = √Āder J√°nos (Kari Hungary: √Āder J√°nos, kngkawas 1959 idas 5 diyax 9-), Hungary ryusu, seyji jnwu. Kngkawas 1990 prading psdhuwan phiyu Cingmin Mong Gikay giying, kngkawas 1998 dhuq kngkawas 2002 ngalan Hungary Kokomin Gikay cusi, kngkawas 2009 wada mangal Oco Gikay giying. Kngkawas 2012 idas 5 diyax 2 wada danan umau soto Hungary Hungary Kwohuy, kngkawas 2017 ka wada mangal soto Dungan. Kndusan Mntuting tuiwil daya Hungary tiping alang mkbrnux Cornau. Kngkawas 1978 mtmay sotu Budapest Pyasan Tubeyhing Roland Hwasweyying smluhay horicu. Kngkawas 1986 dhuq kngkawas 1990, hiya u Hungary Ksweyweyn Syakayswey Keyngkyo Pumn na weynsu. Hiya ka Cingmin Mong pnrdingan pnhiyu na uri, hiya ka Tang dha hwaswey cwancya. Kngkawas 1990 dhuq kngkawas 2009 cida u kwohuy giying ka hiya. Kngkawas 1998 idas 6 dhuq kngkawas 2002 idas 5 hiya u ngalan kwohuy cusi. Kngkawas 2009 cida u wada phyuwan O Co gikay giying ka hiya. Kngkawas 2011 cida u wada tumal knpriyux Hungary pnwaya shwa na qpahun phiyu waya, so musa kndukuricu sing ka shwa Hungary. Hiya u tumal snburah smmalu waya seyngkyo na qpahun phiyu waya uri. Soto Kngkawas 2012 idas 4 diyax 16 cida, wada psdhuwan soto hosweynjn cucng cida ka Cingmin Mong, kiya ka muda rmilih runbung muru bntasan sediq mi mi wada malax qpahun ka brah soto Schmitt Pal. Kwohuy meytaq hyo cida hiya ka ngalan ccng ryeynmong hosweynjn, wada mangal 262 hyo ka dmkuh hiya, wada ini baka ka mtunarac pay balay hantay tang na "Knmalu Balay Hungary Undo" snkaul na qridin Hosweynjn Krisztina Morvai, wada mangal 40 hyo, so kiya wada mndungus balay mbiyax mangal, kiya mi idas 5 diyax 10 ka psdhuwan phiyu soto mi prading 5 kngkawas na qpahun soto. Tasapah Qridin niya ka hwakwan Anita Herczegh. Ddha dha pa tnquli 3 laqi qridin mi 1 laqi snaw. Baki niya G√©za Herczegh pa kndadax kngkawas 1993 dhuq kngkawas 2003 u mnniq Haiya na Kwoci Hoying taxa hwakwan. Pprngawan kari Hungary Kwohuy mniq kngkawas 2018 idas 12 diyax 19 wada muda knsangan dha 'Waya Quli' ka Rawkong Kayke Hwaan (Burah rawkonghwa pndungus kucu knbeyhing bay biyax, malu meysa mpqpah sediq u tnkawas nmalan qmpah diyax smpeyyah 250 jikang malan pkrana dhuq 400 jikang, mthiti snduwan pkrbangun dhuq 3 knkawas). Dmkuh congri Orban Viktor madas burah waya ka soto √Āder J√°nos mniq diyax 20 cida ini qita kcka qnlhangan hantay balay, sndhu pbatas burah waya rawkong. Swey niya pa mdakar soto √Āder J√°nos iya balay uda pbatas pnsdhuwan burah waya, konghuy uri u psicu qulung muda psdhu matas burah waya daw muda dmudul knkana hmtur qmpah Mtunarac cicin cngtang "Knmalu Balay Hungary Undo" smriq msang congri Orban Viktor ndan niya niyi ka snsiqa balay. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = …ü*nos *d…ô…ĺ = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka …ü*nos *d…ô…ĺ ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan ńßuŇča…ĺj ta sajaŇč o kija ka …ü*nos *d…ô…ĺ, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = *d…ô…ĺ …ü*nos = *d…ô…ĺ …ü*nos (ka…ĺi ńßuŇča…ĺj: *d…ô…ĺ …ü*nos, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *-), ńßuŇča…ĺj …ĺjusu, s…ô…üi …ünwu. kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč psdńßuwan pńßiju ¶iŇčmin moŇč gikaj gijiŇč, kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** Ňčalan ńßuŇča…ĺj kokomin gikaj ¶usi, kŇčkawas **** wada maŇčal o ¶o gikaj gijiŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * wada danan umau soto ńßuŇča…ĺj ńßuŇča…ĺj kwońßuj, kŇčkawas **** ka wada maŇčal soto duŇčan. kndusan mntutiŇč tuiwil daja ńßuŇča…ĺj tipiŇč alaŇč mkb…ĺnux ¶o…ĺnau. kŇčkawas **** mtmaj sotu budap…ôst pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč …ĺoland ńßwasw…ôjiŇč smluńßaj ńßo…ĺi ¶u. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas ****, ńßija u ńßuŇča…ĺj ksw…ôw…ôn sjakajsw…ô k…ôŇčkjo pumn na w…ônsu. ńßija ka ¶iŇčmin moŇč pn…ĺdiŇčan pnńßiju na u…ĺi, ńßija ka taŇč dńßa ńßwasw…ô ¶wan ¶ja. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida u kwońßuj gijiŇč ka ńßija. kŇčkawas **** idas * dńßuq kŇčkawas **** idas * ńßija u Ňčalan kwońßuj ¶usi. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida u wada pńßjuwan o ¶o gikaj gijiŇč ka ńßija. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida u wada tumal knp…ĺijux ńßuŇča…ĺj pnwaja sńßwa na qpańßun pńßiju waja, so musa knduku…ĺi ¶u siŇč ka sńßwa ńßuŇča…ĺj. ńßija u tumal snbu…ĺańß smmalu waja s…ôŇčkjo na qpańßun pńßiju waja u…ĺi. soto kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, wada psdńßuwan soto ńßosw…ôn…ün ¶u ¶Ňč ¶ida ka ¶iŇčmin moŇč, kija ka muda …ĺmilińß …ĺunbuŇč mu…ĺu bntasan s…ôdiq mi mi wada malax qpańßun ka b…ĺańß soto s ¶ńßmitt pal. kwońßuj m…ôtaq ńßjo ¶ida ńßija ka Ňčalan ¶ ¶Ňč …ĺj…ônmoŇč ńßosw…ôn…ün, wada maŇčal *** ńßjo ka dmkuńß ńßija, wada ini baka ka mtuna…ĺa ¶ paj balaj ńßantaj taŇč na "knmalu balaj ńßuŇča…ĺj undo" snkaul na q…ĺidin ńßosw…ôn…ün k…ĺis*tina mo…ĺ*ai, wada maŇčal ** ńßjo, so kija wada mnduŇčus balaj mbijax maŇčal, kija mi idas * dijax ** ka psdńßuwan pńßiju soto mi p…ĺadiŇč * kŇčkawas na qpańßun soto. tasapańß q…ĺidin nija ka ńßwakwan anita ńß…ô…ĺ ¶*…ôgńß. ddńßa dńßa pa tnquli * laqi q…ĺidin mi * laqi snaw. baki nija g**a ńß…ô…ĺ ¶*…ôgńß pa kndadax kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** u mnniq ńßaija na kwo ¶i ńßojiŇč taxa ńßwakwan. pp…ĺŇčawan ka…ĺi ńßuŇča…ĺj kwońßuj mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** wada muda knsaŇčan dńßa 'waja quli' ka …ĺawkoŇč kajk…ô ńßwaan (bu…ĺańß …ĺawkoŇčńßwa pnduŇčus ku ¶u knb…ôńßiŇč baj bijax, malu m…ôsa mpqpańß s…ôdiq u tnkawas nmalan qmpańß dijax smp…ôjańß *** …üikaŇč malan pk…ĺana dńßuq *** …üikaŇč, mtńßiti snduwan pk…ĺbaŇčun dńßuq * knkawas). dmkuńß ¶oŇč…ĺi o…ĺban *ikto…ĺ madas bu…ĺańß waja ka soto *d…ô…ĺ …ü*nos mniq dijax ** ¶ida ini qita k ¶ka qnlńßaŇčan ńßantaj balaj, sndńßu pbatas bu…ĺańß waja …ĺawkoŇč. sw…ô nija pa mdaka…ĺ soto *d…ô…ĺ …ü*nos ija balaj uda pbatas pnsdńßuwan bu…ĺańß waja, koŇčńßuj u…ĺi u psi ¶u quluŇč muda psdńßu matas bu…ĺańß waja daw muda dmudul knkana ńßmtu…ĺ qmpańß mtuna…ĺa ¶ ¶i ¶in ¶ŇčtaŇč "knmalu balaj ńßuŇča…ĺj undo" sm…ĺiq msaŇč ¶oŇč…ĺi o…ĺban *ikto…ĺ ndan nija niji ka snsiqa balaj. pnjańßan pnatas
S.FORM: = J√°nos √Āder = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 5 jiyax 3 ka J√°nos √Āder ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Hungary ta sayang o kiya ka J√°nos √Āder, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 5 jiyax 10 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = √Āder J√°nos = √Āder J√°nos (Kari Hungary: √Āder J√°nos, kngkawas 1959 idas 5 diyax 9-), Hungary ryusu, seyji jnwu. Kngkawas 1990 prading psdhuwan phiyu Cingmin Mong Gikay giying, kngkawas 1998 dhuq kngkawas 2002 ngalan Hungary Kokomin Gikay cusi, kngkawas 2009 wada mangal Oco Gikay giying. Kngkawas 2012 idas 5 diyax 2 wada danan umau soto Hungary Hungary Kwohuy, kngkawas 2017 ka wada mangal soto Dungan. Kndusan Mntuting tuiwil daya Hungary tiping alang mkbrnux Cornau. Kngkawas 1978 mtmay sotu Budapest Pyasan Tubeyhing Roland Hwasweyying smluhay horicu. Kngkawas 1986 dhuq kngkawas 1990, hiya u Hungary Ksweyweyn Syakayswey Keyngkyo Pumn na weynsu. Hiya ka Cingmin Mong pnrdingan pnhiyu na uri, hiya ka Tang dha hwaswey cwancya. Kngkawas 1990 dhuq kngkawas 2009 cida u kwohuy giying ka hiya. Kngkawas 1998 idas 6 dhuq kngkawas 2002 idas 5 hiya u ngalan kwohuy cusi. Kngkawas 2009 cida u wada phyuwan O Co gikay giying ka hiya. Kngkawas 2011 cida u wada tumal knpriyux Hungary pnwaya shwa na qpahun phiyu waya, so musa kndukuricu sing ka shwa Hungary. Hiya u tumal snburah smmalu waya seyngkyo na qpahun phiyu waya uri. Soto Kngkawas 2012 idas 4 diyax 16 cida, wada psdhuwan soto hosweynjn cucng cida ka Cingmin Mong, kiya ka muda rmilih runbung muru bntasan sediq mi mi wada malax qpahun ka brah soto Schmitt Pal. Kwohuy meytaq hyo cida hiya ka ngalan ccng ryeynmong hosweynjn, wada mangal 262 hyo ka dmkuh hiya, wada ini baka ka mtunarac pay balay hantay tang na "Knmalu Balay Hungary Undo" snkaul na qridin Hosweynjn Krisztina Morvai, wada mangal 40 hyo, so kiya wada mndungus balay mbiyax mangal, kiya mi idas 5 diyax 10 ka psdhuwan phiyu soto mi prading 5 kngkawas na qpahun soto. Tasapah Qridin niya ka hwakwan Anita Herczegh. Ddha dha pa tnquli 3 laqi qridin mi 1 laqi snaw. Baki niya G√©za Herczegh pa kndadax kngkawas 1993 dhuq kngkawas 2003 u mnniq Haiya na Kwoci Hoying taxa hwakwan. Pprngawan kari Hungary Kwohuy mniq kngkawas 2018 idas 12 diyax 19 wada muda knsangan dha 'Waya Quli' ka Rawkong Kayke Hwaan (Burah rawkonghwa pndungus kucu knbeyhing bay biyax, malu meysa mpqpah sediq u tnkawas nmalan qmpah diyax smpeyyah 250 jikang malan pkrana dhuq 400 jikang, mthiti snduwan pkrbangun dhuq 3 knkawas). Dmkuh congri Orban Viktor madas burah waya ka soto √Āder J√°nos mniq diyax 20 cida ini qita kcka qnlhangan hantay balay, sndhu pbatas burah waya rawkong. Swey niya pa mdakar soto √Āder J√°nos iya balay uda pbatas pnsdhuwan burah waya, konghuy uri u psicu qulung muda psdhu matas burah waya daw muda dmudul knkana hmtur qmpah Mtunarac cicin cngtang "Knmalu Balay Hungary Undo" smriq msang congri Orban Viktor ndan niya niyi ka snsiqa balay. pńßjuwan o ¶o gikaj gijiŇč ka ńßija. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida u wada tumal knp…ĺijux ńßuŇča…ĺj pnwaja sńßwa na qpańßun pńßiju waja, so musa knduku…ĺi ¶u siŇč ka sńßwa ńßuŇča…ĺj. ńßija u tumal snbu…ĺańß smmalu waja s…ôŇčkjo na qpańßun pńßiju waja u…ĺi. soto kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, wada psdńßuwan soto ńßosw…ôn…ün ¶u ¶Ňč ¶ida ka ¶iŇčmin moŇč, kija ka muda …ĺmilińß …ĺunbuŇč mu…ĺu bntasan s…ôdiq mi mi wada malax qpańßun ka b…ĺańß soto s ¶ńßmitt pal. kwońßuj m…ôtaq ńßjo ¶ida ńßija ka Ňčalan ¶ ¶Ňč …ĺj…ônmoŇč ńßosw…ôn…ün, wada maŇčal *** ńßjo ka dmkuńß ńßija, wada ini baka ka mtuna…ĺa ¶ mtńßiti snduwan pk…ĺbaŇčun dńßuq * knkawas). dmkuńß ¶oŇč…ĺi o…ĺban *ikto…ĺ madas bu…ĺańß waja ka soto *d…ô…ĺ …ü*nos mniq dijax ** ¶ida ini qita k ¶ka qnlńßaŇčan ńßantaj balaj, sndńßu pbatas bu…ĺańß waja …ĺawkoŇč. sw…ô nija pa mdaka…ĺ soto *d…ô…ĺ …ü*nos ija balaj uda pbatas pnsdńßuwan bu…ĺańß waja, koŇčńßuj u…ĺi u psi ¶u quluŇč muda psdńßu matas bu…ĺańß waja daw muda dmudul knkana ńßmtu…ĺ qmpańß mtuna…ĺa ¶ ¶i ¶in ¶ŇčtaŇč "knmalu balaj ńßuŇča…ĺj undo" sm…ĺiq msaŇč ¶oŇč…ĺi o…ĺban *ikto…ĺ ndan nija niji ka snsiqa balaj. pnjańßan pnatas
